title: Define JWT-based off-chain session token format for verified handshakes
description: After a successful on-chain handshake verification, there is no standardized way to carry the result into off-chain API calls. Define a JWT profile (RFC 7519) where the payload includes the humanNullifier, agentNullifier, sessionNonce, scopeCommitment, and chain of delegation nullifiers. The JWT is signed by the relayer/verifier and has a short TTL (e.g., 5 minutes). This lets services accept Bolyra auth results without querying on-chain state per request, and gives framework integrations (LangChain, Vercel AI) a standard bearer token to pass. Deliverable: a spec document in spec/ with ABNF for the JWT claims, a reference TS implementation in sdk/, and 10+ test vectors.
